name: Apricot Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the apricots to a boil.
2. Cook until the liquid is absorbed and the apricots are tender, about 20 minutes.
3. Stir in the sieved mixture until crumbly. Add about 1/4 cup sliced almonds if desired.
4. Make the All-Purpose Butter Roll recipe (using the dough setting on your Bread Machine).
5. Roll the dough into a rectangle (12" x 7") and divide it in half.
6. Spread the apricot filling down the center third of each dough lengthwise (12").
7. Cut slits about 1 inch apart on either side of the filling, creating 12 strips that crisscross over the filling.
8. Place the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
9. Sprinkle with the crumb topping and let rise in a warm place until doubled.
10. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
11. Cool slightly and drizzle with confectioners' sugar icing (1 cup powdered sugar mixed with a few tablespoons of water).
